notes: Imported from competitor Meta Ad Library scraper

cards.body: If you’ve ever wished your skincare could double as makeup, this is it. Miracle Balm feels like a hydrating treatment, but it gives you that fresh, dewy finish that honestly looks better than foundation.
cards.title: My Skin, But Glowier
